message:
fix(perf+test): seed demo token in perf spec; bump auth test waitFor timeout (#6178)

#6176 — perf react-commits spec was setting kc-demo-mode=true but NOT seeding
the token in localStorage. Without a token, AuthProvider.refreshUser() runs
checkOAuthConfiguredWithRetry() (5 retries × 2s = up to 10s of background
revalidate noise) before settling. The commit counter then measures auth-
revalidate churn instead of the actual SPA navigation cost — exactly what
Copilot caught on PR #6174. Fix: also seed STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN with
DEMO_TOKEN_VALUE in the same addInitScript so the app boots straight into
demo mode with no auth handshake.

#6175 — auth.test.ts "drops session to login when /api/me fails and cache
is stale (#6067)" reappeared as flaky in Coverage Suite run #486. Test
passes locally in <100ms but the coverage build with istanbul
instrumentation slows the async unwind (refreshUser → catch →
setTokenState(null) → React commit) past the default waitFor timeout of
1000ms. Bumped that single waitFor to 5000ms — generous for the
instrumented build, still completes fast on a healthy run.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
